summary: Iteration 44/45 backend verification. All 5 requested features verified: (1) cargo_weight_kg now required & >0 (422 on missing/zero/negative, 200 on valid weight, quote total_price scales with weight). (2) Driver payout persists bank_details onto driver doc (verified via GET /api/driver/me after POST /api/driver/wallet/payout with bank_details). (3) PATCH /api/driver/me updates bank_details and is reflected on subsequent GET. (4) POST /api/admin/settings/stripe {webhook_secret:'whsec_test123'} returns webhook_configured=true and webhook_secret_masked; persists across two GET calls. (5) Refund regression: test_full_refund_excludes_from_driver_wallet still PASSES. Full iter43 webhook/refund suite (18 tests) all green after iter45 cleanup. 9/9 new + 18/18 regression = 27/27 PASSED.
action_items: Frontend wiring: prefill bank details from driver.bank_details on cash-out modal; expose edit form in driver profile (PATCH /api/driver/me).
Frontend admin: display masked webhook_secret using webhook_secret_masked from /api/admin/settings/stripe.
Shipper UI: ensure cargo_weight_kg field is required (>0) before submitting POST /api/shipper/shipments so users see inline error rather than 422.
Code review: setting webhook_secret to non-empty value globally affects webhook signature verification — consider per-test isolation if more webhook tests are added.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is very large (>4000 lines). Continue extracting routes (already partially done in routes/*).
Stripe webhook_secret is shared global state in services/payments.py; test pollution risk. Consider supporting both an env-bootstrapped secret and a separate test-only override.
ShipmentCreateRequest.cargo_weight_kg now correctly uses Field(gt=0); BankDetails model & PayoutRequest.bank_details look clean.
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used demo accounts (demo.shipper, demo.driver, admin) via /api/seed-demo when needed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend changes for cargo_weight_kg requirement, BankDetails persistence (driver.bank_details), and Stripe webhook secret save/persist are fully verified. Test file /app/backend/tests/test_iter45_weight_bank_webhook.py includes a teardown that clears the webhook_secret to avoid polluting iter43 webhook tests. Frontend wiring is still pending per main agent note.
rca_of_issue: Webhook secret 'not saving' bug appears resolved: POST /api/admin/settings/stripe with webhook_secret persists via _persist_stripe_settings() to DB and reflects webhook_configured=true + webhook_secret_masked on subsequent GETs across two reads.
